text: Entering this place, I am greeted by a curious blend of sterile modernity and vivid illumination. The glass barrier is both an invitation and a defense, reminding me how we so often observe life from a distance. A sense of anticipation grows within me—a subtle tension—as if every surface and glowing sign urges me to reflect on my own presence here. Am I merely an observer, or do I shape the space with my attention and questions? I feel oddly exposed, yet energized, as though something meaningful might reveal itself if I just linger and listen long enough.
